patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73 (DOB recorded most often as 05/05/1952) with multiple ambulatory encounters across Singing River and Piedmont systems. Key diagnoses documented include mixed dyslipidemia (primary, 06/30/2023), essential hypertension (06/30/2023), postoperative/unspecified anemia (06/30/2023), and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (documented 01/21/2025). Major procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy scheduled and recorded on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Significant labs: 07/03/2023 lipid panel with triglycerides 158 (H) and VLDL 32 (H); ferritin 266.8 (H); iron 41 (L); eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L). Functional assessments document mobility and activities of daily living limitations on 06/14/2023 and 01/05/2021. Multiple care team members recorded including Hand HA MD (PCP) and Piedmont specialists. Conflicting demographic entries (legal sex and DOB) and inconsistent smoking records are preserved for reconciliation.
